questions.text: Which hook is used to manage local state in a React function component?
What does JSX stand for in React?
Which HTTP method is idempotent by definition?
What is the default port for PostgreSQL?
Why would you pass a dependency array to useEffect?
options: To control when the effect re-runs

questions.text: What is the purpose of Next.js middleware?
options: To run code before a request is completed

questions.text: When would you use a REST API over GraphQL?
options: When the client needs flexible field selection
When the resource graph is simple and caching via HTTP is desired

questions.text: What is a Docker multi-stage build primarily used for?
options: Reducing final image size by separating build and runtime

questions.text: Which pattern avoids stale closures inside setInterval in React?
options: Storing the latest value in a ref

questions.text: What problem does React Server Components solve that SSR alone does not?
options: Eliminating client-side JavaScript for non-interactive components

questions.text: In a distributed system, what does the CAP theorem say about a partition-tolerant system?
options: It can be both consistent and available
It must sacrifice either consistency or availability

questions.text: What is the key trade-off of using eventual consistency over strong consistency?
options: Higher availability and performance at the cost of temporary stale reads
